kind: corpus-WRF midday d03 column inputs -> GPU sfclayrev -> vs same-step WRF HFX/T2/UST (NOT a self-compare)
notes: Water (Fairall z0t) and momentum (ustar/u10/v10 on znt) are UNCHANGED.

Residual land HFX > corpus is the Noah-MP LSM surface-energy-balance coupling, not reproducible by a standalone surface layer; the binding metric is the T2 diagnostic, which drops from +3.6 K to ~+1 K land bias.
root_cause: Corpus L3 ran sf_sfclay_physics=5 (MYNN surface layer); over land MYNN uses a thermal roughness z_t (Zilitinkevich 1995, CZIL=0.085) << momentum roughness for the heat profile. The bare sfclayrev port used momentum roughness for heat -> psit ~4x too small -> HFX ~4x over -> +3.6 K T2 warm bias. Fix: port the MYNN land thermal roughness for psit/psit2/psiq.
